# M3 - Document & Chat APIs

**Owner:** Karthic V  
**Full spec:** [specs/MODULE_SPEC_M3.md](../../specs/MODULE_SPEC_M3.md)  
**Files in scope:** `{backend/app/api/admin.py,backend/app/api/chat.py,backend/app/services/n8n_client.py,backend/app/services/file_validator.py,tests/test_chat.py}`

## What this module does
Upload, document mgmt, /chat/query proxy to n8n (mock-first)

## Required skills
- **Must-have:** FastAPI UploadFile, async Python, httpx, Pydantic v2, multipart, env config
- **Nice-to-have:** Streaming responses, background tasks, n8n webhook conventions
- **Soft skills:** Mock-first dev so FE isn't blocked

## Mandatory rules when editing files in this scope
1. Read the [full spec](../../specs/MODULE_SPEC_M3.md) before changing code - it has the day-by-day plan, acceptance criteria, and learning resources.
2. Honour the repo-wide [locked stack](../copilot-instructions.md) - no new deps without M1 approval.
3. Honour the API contract in [specs/openapi.yaml](../../specs/openapi.yaml). Contract changes need an M1-reviewed PR first.
4. Multi-tenant isolation: every query touching tenant data MUST filter by `tenant_id`.
5. No secrets in code. Read config from `app.core.config.settings` (Python) or `process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_*` (frontend).
6. Add at least one test (unit or integration) per PR.
7. No `print()` in Python - use `logging`.

## When generating code for this module
- Prefer editing existing files over creating new ones.
- Match existing style (Black/isort for Python, Prettier for TS).
- Cite the spec section you're implementing in the PR description.
- If the spec is ambiguous, ask in the PR rather than guessing.

## Cross-module dependencies
- Upstream contract: `specs/openapi.yaml` (M1).
- Shared models: `backend/app/models/models.py` (M2).
- Shared n8n client: `backend/app/services/n8n_client.py` (M3).
